query:
UPDATE island_guides 
SET faq = JSON_ARRAY(
  JSON_OBJECT('question', '🤿 What water activities are available?', 'answer', 'Snorkeling, diving, swimming, fishing trips, and water sports are popular. The clear waters and vibrant coral reefs make this an excellent destination for marine exploration.'),
  JSON_OBJECT('question', '🚤 How do I get to this island?', 'answer', 'The island is accessible by speedboat or ferry from Malé International Airport. Transfer times typically range from 30 minutes to 2 hours depending on the island location.'),
  JSON_OBJECT('question', '🏖️ What is the best time to visit?', 'answer', 'November to April is the dry season with calm seas and sunny weather. May to October is the monsoon season with occasional rain but fewer tourists and lower prices.'),
  JSON_OBJECT('question', '💰 What is the average daily budget?', 'answer', 'Budget travelers: $40-70/day. Mid-range: $80-120/day. Luxury: $150+/day. Prices vary based on accommodation type and dining choices.'),
  JSON_OBJECT('question', '🌊 Is the island safe?', 'answer', 'Yes, the Maldives is very safe. Petty theft is rare, and the islands are peaceful. Always follow local customs and respect cultural norms.'),
  JSON_OBJECT('question', '📸 What should I pack?', 'answer', 'Sunscreen (reef-safe), light clothing, swimwear, hat, sunglasses, reef shoes, medications, and travel documents. Bring reef-safe products to protect marine life.'),
  JSON_OBJECT('question', '🍽️ What food options are available?', 'answer', 'Local Maldivian cuisine featuring fresh seafood, rice, and coconut-based dishes. International cuisine available at resorts. Local cafes offer affordable traditional meals.'),
  JSON_OBJECT('question', '📱 What is the internet and phone connectivity?', 'answer', 'Mobile networks cover most islands with 4G/LTE. WiFi is available at resorts and guesthouses. International roaming is available but can be expensive.')
)
WHERE COALESCE(faq, '') = ''
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute UPDATE island_guides
